questions.hindi: इस month कई public holidays होंगे।
questions.english: There will be many public holidays this month.
questions.hint: There will be + many + plural + future

questions.hindi: उस debate में कई interesting points थे।
questions.english: There were many interesting points in that debate.

questions.hindi: क्या आपके team में कोई data analyst है?
questions.english: Is there any data analyst in your team?

questions.hindi: project में कोई quality issues नहीं हुए हैं।
questions.english: There have been no quality issues in the project.
questions.hint: There have been no + plural + perfect negative

questions.hindi: अगले साल company में merger होगा।
questions.english: There will be a merger in the company next year.

questions.hindi: स्कूल की canteen में आज special menu है।
questions.english: There is a special menu in the school canteen today.

questions.hindi: उस locality में पहले कोई road नहीं थी।
questions.english: There was no road in that locality before.
questions.hint: There was no + singular + past negative

questions.hindi: इस month team में कोई absenteeism नहीं है।
questions.english: There is no absenteeism in the team this month.

questions.hindi: उस time Mumbai में कोई Metro नहीं थी।
questions.english: There was no Metro in Mumbai at that time.
questions.hint: There was no + singular + past negative

questions.hindi: next year company में new training programs होंगे।
questions.english: There will be new training programs in the company next year.

questions.hindi: उस गाँव में कोई internet connectivity नहीं थी।
questions.english: There was no internet connectivity in that village.
questions.hint: There was no + uncountable + past negative

questions.hindi: क्या इस school में कोई scholarship program है?
questions.english: Is there any scholarship program in this school?

questions.hindi: recently company में कोई major restructuring हुई है।
questions.english: There has been a major restructuring in the company recently.

questions.hindi: उस building की 5th floor पर एक terrace है।
questions.english: There is a terrace on the 5th floor of that building.

questions.hindi: पिछले year किसी भी student को कोई scholarship नहीं मिली थी।
questions.english: There was no scholarship for any student last year.
questions.hint: There was no + singular + past negative

questions.hindi: इस hospital में free treatment होगी।
questions.english: There will be free treatment in this hospital.

questions.hindi: उस दिन के program में कोई entertainment नहीं था।
questions.english: There was no entertainment in that day's program.
questions.hint: There was no + uncountable + past negative

questions.hindi: क्या इस package में कोई insurance cover है?
questions.english: Is there any insurance cover in this package?

questions.hindi: हाल ही में कुछ political changes हुए हैं।
questions.english: There have been some political changes recently.
questions.hint: There have been + some + plural + perfect

questions.hindi: अगले year education sector में बड़े reforms होंगे।
questions.english: There will be big reforms in the education sector next year.

questions.hindi: उस project की deadline में कोई flexibility नहीं है।
questions.english: There is no flexibility in that project's deadline.
alternatives: There isn't any flexibility in that project's deadline.

questions.hindi: meeting के बाद एक team dinner होगी।
questions.english: There will be a team dinner after the meeting.

questions.hindi: उस area में recently कई burglaries हुई हैं।
questions.english: There have been many burglaries in that area recently.
questions.hint: There have been + many + plural + perfect

questions.hindi: इस company में employee retention कोई problem नहीं है।
questions.english: There is no employee retention problem in this company.

questions.hindi: next conference में 500 से ज्यादा delegates होंगे।
questions.english: There will be more than 500 delegates in the next conference.
questions.hint: There will be + number + plural + future

questions.hindi: इस 75 days challenge में बहुत knowledge है।
questions.english: There is a lot of knowledge in this 75 days challenge.
questions.hint: There is + a lot of + uncountable
